content: The user profile page shows stale data after editing. Why doesn't it update?
The profile edit saves correctly to the API, but the local React state isn't being updated. After the PUT request succeeds, the component doesn't refetch or update its cached data.
What's the best way to fix this?

After a successful update, invalidate the query cache so the data refetches:

```js
await updateProfile(data)
queryClient.invalidateQueries(['profile', userId])
```
This will trigger a refetch and the UI will show the updated data immediately.
